title: Michael Mikaelian
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Michael}}
[[File:Michael_Mikaelian.jpg|thumb|right]]
'''Michael Mikaelian''' is an author who has written many ''Star Wars'' short stories and sourcebooks and has had a number of articles published in ''Star Wars'' magazines such as ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]''.

==''Star Wars'' works==
===Short stories===
*{{GalaxyCite|3|Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire}} (1995)
*{{GalaxyCite|5|Double Cross on Ord Mantell}} (1995)

===Sourcebooks===
*''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]'' (2002)
*''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' (2003)
*''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'' (2004)

===Magazine issues with articles from Michael Mikaelian===
*[[Star Wars Gamer 2|''Star Wars Gamer'' 2]] (2000)
*[[Star Wars Gamer 3|''Star Wars Gamer'' 3]] (2001)
*[[Star Wars Gamer 4|''Star Wars Gamer'' 4]] (2001)
*[[Star Wars Gamer 5|''Star Wars Gamer'' 5]] (2001)
*[[Star Wars Gamer 6|''Star Wars Gamer'' 6]] (2001)
*[[Star Wars Gamer 7|''Star Wars Gamer'' 7]] (2001)
*[[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]] (2002)
*[[Star Wars Insider 63|''Star Wars Insider'' 63]] (2002)
